creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
Created attachment 224958
Patch for h264 decoder allowing to watch shared screen under Microsoft Teams

(In reply to Matthias Wolf from comment #2)

I have this patch enhanced a bit to completely disabling the spurious check. It seems to work with Microsoft Teams. With this patch applied I am able to watch the screen if someone shares it during the conference. Also "Large Galery" and "Together" modes during the conference can be applied (it wasn't fully tested with attendees). In the situations described above Microsoft Teams without this patch was always crashing.
